title: Elytra Trims
description: a paper / purpur plugin that adds server support for the popular Elytra Trims fabric mod by KikuGie
body:
# Elytra Trims 
Everyone knows of the fantastic mod by KikuGie for trimming your elytra, and I got sad we couldn't use it on Paper servers, so I made a plugin that handles all the server side recipes and NBT logic so that your players can actually decorate Elytra on Paper/Purpur :D

Check out the original mod for all features, and ofc full credit goes to KikuGie, I am merely an enabler :D 

## Requirements
- [NBTAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nbtapi) plugin
- [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims) mod


**IMPORTANT**: this plugin doesn't add textures, or rendering, or anything like that. All it does it add the relevant component and nbt data to the elytra item, so that the client side mode can read it and render the graphics. This means it will do *nothing* for people without the client side mod, enabling vanilla players to miss out on it if they wish. 

#### Permissions
- elytratrims.craft.trim
- elytratrims.craft.dye
- elytratrims.craft.pattern
- elytratrims.effect.glow
- elytratrims.effect.cosmic
- elytratrims.effect.animation
- elytratrims.cauldron
- elytratrims.admin
